text.title: QA Performance Run Verdict Template Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the report artefact this methodology produces. Validator in scripts/validate-qa-perf-run-verdict-template.py enforces required keys, enum bounds, and pattern constraints.

section.title: Schema

example.note: All required keys present; enums and patterns satisfied.
Forbidden traits: verdict not in enum; baseline_ref missing; samples_per_endpoint<1000 without INCONCLUSIVE; recommendation not in enum.
